body_excerpt: In registerRemoteBugreportReceivers of DevicePolicyManagerService.java, there is a possible reporting of falsified bug reports due to a missing permission check. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
